description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-button-group

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-button-group/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 88 (B)
**Known issues:** 'internals' and 'role' properties missing descriptions.

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Gap/spacing between buttons. Border radius handling on grouped buttons. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. role="group" with aria-label. Keyboard navigation between buttons.
3. **Functionality** — Horizontal/vertical orientation. Button spacing. First/last border radius. Mixed button types.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. ElementInternals for role. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Adjacent button border handling. Responsive stacking.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix internals + role descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Grouping behavior. Orientation. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** — Horizontal/vertical. Mixed buttons. Sizes.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-button-group
